title: Anti-collusion mechanisms for secure multiparty computation
description: Ongoing work on mechanisms that discourage collusion among participants in general secure multiparty computation, combining cryptographic and game-theoretic techniques.

title: Asynchronous verifiable information dispersal
description: Improving existing asynchronous verifiable information dispersal protocols, and designing message-loss-resilient protocols in the asynchronous network model.

title: Oblivious transfer for anonymous healthcare rebates
description: A cryptographic protocol for anonymous healthcare rebates based on oblivious transfer, with an implementation of oblivious polynomial evaluation in MP-SPDZ (Decentralized Systems Laboratory, UIUC).

title: Zero-knowledge proof circuits in Plonky2
description: Implementation of a Plonky2 zero-knowledge proof circuit in Rust, from a graduate course on applied cryptography.
